Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF National Death Index Segment Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 2.6 15 

062 = Other and unspecified diseases of 
respiratory system (J22, J30–
J39, J43–J44, J47–J68, J70–J98) 

063 = Diseases of the digestive system 
(K00–K92) 

064 = Gastritis, duodenitis, and 
noninfective enteritis and colitis 
(K29, K50–K55) 

065 = Hernia of abdominal cavity and 
intestinal obstruction without 
hernia (K40–K46, K56) 

066 = All other and unspecified
